q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Template().render() is an in-memory string evaluation; danger depends on template content, which is controlled and can be kept benign (e.g., {{ 7 * 7 }}) in a test environment.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: The rendered template output is assigned to 'body' and returned directly inside an HttpResponse(body, content_type='text/html').

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: returns.kind is 'value' and returns.exprs shows the HttpResponse object containing the rendered body is returned directly in memory.
